title: Ninja Weapons
description: A small mod that adds swords, a net, bombs, and armor. Made by my brother using MCreator.
body: A cool mod with lots of ninja gear. There's ninja armor which provides helpful status effects which make sense for a ninja, cool weapons (such as a lightning sword and throwable explosives), and shurikens. There is also a net which turns any mob into a wither skull. To craft the armor, you need a seiho. ("Seiho" is Japanese for "life insurance". It is the only word I know.) You can get four of them by placing black dye on all four sides of a Nether Star in the crafting table. The seiho can then be crafted with a piece of diamond armor to obtain a piece of ninja armor. To craft an Iron Katana, you put an iron sword in the center of the table, with a stick below it and an iron ingot above it. The katana can be upgraded to netherite in the smithing table. To give your sword special powers. surround it with Blaze Powder, Blue Ice, Phantom Membranes, Lightning Rods, or Obsidian in the crafting grid. Each of the five different elemental swords has a different effect. A net can be crafted using a string in the middle and four more in the corners. You can craft throwable bombs using iron on all four sides of a piece of TNT. Shurikens can be made by putting four iron nuggets around an iron ingot. You can also craft a Big Red Button using eight iron ingots surrounding a piece of red wool. You can then put the button back in the crafting grid to make four Small Red Buttons.
